cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a present of a different color. Let me jot down the initial gifts: - Alice: pink ball - Bob: brown present - Claire: green present - Dave: red present - Eve: purple present Now, there are several swaps. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Claire and Bob swap. So after that, Claire will have Bob's gift and Bob will have Claire's original one. Let me note that: After first swap (Claire & Bob): - Claire: brown present (originally Bob's) - Bob: green present (originally Claire's) Others remain the same for now. Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. So Claire gives her current gift (brown) to Dave, and takes Dave's original red present. After second swap (Claire & Dave): - Claire: red present (from Dave) - Dave:
